overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded protagonist walking through an ancient Egyptian city. The character moves from a narrow walled corridor into open areas featuring sphinx statues, ceremonial gates with hieroglyphics, camels, and active construction sites with wooden scaffolding.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor between mud-brick fortification wall and decorated temple wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow dirt path between high walls, approaching palm trees in the distance

entered.detail: tall weathered mud-brick fortification wall with crenellations
white stone temple wall with colorful painted columns and hieroglyphic decorations
tall palm trees visible at the end of the corridor
green bushes and vegetation growing along the base of the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow enclosed dirt path between a tall mud-brick wall on the left and a decorated white temple wall with columns on the right. Palm trees are visible ahead at the corridor's end, and desert vegetation lines the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: construction site with wooden scaffolding and scattered debris

events.description: exits narrow corridor into open construction area with wooden scaffolding and unfinished stone buildings
passes dead bodies lying on the ground near the construction site

agents.ego_description: walking through the open construction area, navigating around debris and scaffolding

notable_agents.action: worker walking near the wooden scaffolding

entered.detail: large wooden construction scaffolding surrounding an unfinished building
partially constructed stone building with exposed wooden beams
scattered rocks and building materials on the dirt ground

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide construction site with wooden scaffolding and unfinished stone buildings on the left. The character walks past dead bodies lying on the rocky dirt ground as the path leads toward an avenue lined with distant sphinx statues.

scene_state.functional_zone: ceremonial avenue lined with large sphinx statues

agents.ego_description: walking down the grand avenue between rows of massive sphinx statues

notable_agents.action: civilian walking toward the camera down the avenue

entered.detail: large stone sphinx statues with human heads lining the left side of the avenue
large stone sphinx statues with human heads lining the right side of the avenue
rocky desert mountains visible in the distance beyond the avenue

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a wide ceremonial avenue flanked by massive stone sphinx statues on both sides. The path stretches toward distant mountains while a few pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: city gate entrance with hieroglyphic decorations and animal pens

events.description: encounters camels and guards near the decorated gate wall with hieroglyphics

agents.ego_description: walking past the decorated gate entrance, observing camels and guards along the wall

notable_agents.action: camels standing tethered near the gate wall
guards in white robes standing watch near the gate entrance

entered.detail: tall stone gate wall with colorful hieroglyphic paintings and carvings
fortified stone wall extending from the gate with regular crenellations

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a decorated city gate with hieroglyphic carvings, where camels are tethered and guards stand watch. The path continues alongside a fortified stone wall with the mountain range now visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial construction site with wooden towers and scaffolding

events.description: enters area with heavy industrial wooden construction towers and scaffolding

agents.ego_description: walking through the dusty construction area with large wooden scaffolding structures

notable_agents.action: cat walking across the dirt path

entered.detail: tall wooden industrial towers and cranes used for construction
heavy wooden scaffolding structures surrounding construction materials
dust and smoke rising from the construction site

segments.scene_description: The character moves through an industrial construction zone featuring tall wooden towers and heavy scaffolding. Dust and smoke rise from the site as the path continues toward distant mountains, with a small cat crossing the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined temple corridor into the sprawling, industrial heart of an ancient Egyptian city. It begins along a narrow dirt path enclosed by a mud-brick wall and a decorated white temple, moving forward until the corridor opens into a wide construction site filled with wooden scaffolding and fallen bodies. As the character advances, the scene expands into a grand ceremonial avenue flanked by massive stone sphinx statues that lead the eye toward distant mountains. The camera then passes through a decorated city gate adorned with hieroglyphics and tethered camels before turning toward a fortified stone wall. Finally, the path shifts into a dusty industrial zone characterized by towering wooden scaffolds and rising smoke, where a small cat crosses the ground against the backdrop of the far-off mountain range.
